title: Extracting Author Information
scenario: Extract author's name, email, and affiliation from a given text. The text is a publication abstract. The extracted information should be in a specific format (e.g., 'Full Name: John Doe, Email: john.doe@example.com, Affiliation: ABC University').
constraints: Must include the extracted information in the specified format

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt adheres to the specified constraints
Check if the extracted information is accurate
Check if the extracted information is in the specified format
